barRaise.topFinding: First bar-raise where a structural HIGH closed: the dual-path enemy target-reacquire divergence is unified at 1.0 with constants.gd as source of truth and an audit-dual-path check enforcing it. But three process-side HIGHs carried over and two grew: project.godot config/version is still 0.74.38 vs GDD 0.75.2 (fourth cycle, no release guard), the canonical-audit chain has missed four straight days, and the S-34 scale decision is still unmade with all eight multimesh flags false. The engine is retiring code debt; the release pipeline and scheduled-task layer around it are not.
